brief_justification: Wrong answer (relic's shelf instead of camp table) but reasoning approach of tracking object movements was sound; surface-level analysis that only traced Emma's move without considering Eli's knowledge state; no self-monitoring or questioning of assumptions; no verification against what Eli actually observed; slight hedging with 'most likely' but no structured uncertainty; no alternative locations considered despite camp table being the original known location; shows one derivation step (Emma moved it) but doesn't examine whether Eli witnessed that move.
